task_description: Structural UX redesign of the review workspace, findings, progress state, and review history. Rebuild the user-facing hierarchy to feel simple, calm, and report-first instead of a multi-agent control room.

verification.summary: Next.js build passes cleanly. Vitest shows 21 failures (all pre-existing backend/DB-related flaky tests). No new test failures. The UI test file (ui-logic.test.ts) passes all tests except the pre-existing deriveVerdict edge case. Review fixes applied: click-outside handler, stricter parseLocation, fetch timeout with AbortController.
